name: Sunflower
baseAbility: Produces 50 sun every 24 seconds.
plantFoodEffect: Instantly produces 150 sun.

name: Twin Sunflower
baseAbility: Produces 100 sun per cycle.
plantFoodEffect: Instantly produces 250 sun.

name: Sun-shroom
baseAbility: Grows in 3 stages, producing more sun (25/50/75). To Stg2: 24s | To Stg3: 72s
plantFoodEffect: Instantly grows to full size and produces 225 sun.

name: Primal Sunflower
baseAbility: Produces large 75-sun drops right from the start.
plantFoodEffect: Instantly produces 225 sun.

name: Gold Bloom
baseAbility: Instantly bursts out a large amount of sun, then disappears. (375 sun)
plantFoodEffect: None (single-use).

name: Peashooter
baseAbility: Shoots straight peas.
plantFoodEffect: Fires a rapid volley of peas for a few seconds.

name: Repeater
baseAbility: Shoots 2 straight peas in quick succession.
plantFoodEffect: Fires a heavy volley plus 1 giant pea (20x damage).

name: Threepeater
baseAbility: Shoots peas across 3 parallel lanes at once.
plantFoodEffect: Fires a fanned volley across every lane.

name: Snow Pea
baseAbility: Shoots straight peas that slow zombies down.
plantFoodEffect: Freezes the lane and fires an icy volley.

name: Rotobaga
baseAbility: Shoots in 4 diagonal directions.
plantFoodEffect: Fires a volley in all 4 diagonal directions.

name: Pea Pod
baseAbility: Shoots one straight pea per stacked head (up to 5 heads).
plantFoodEffect: Fires a giant pea per head (20x damage).

name: Split Pea
baseAbility: Shoots 1 pea forward and 2 peas backward.
plantFoodEffect: Fires volleys forward and backward at the same time.

name: Citron
baseAbility: Shoots a heavy straight shot (requires charge time).
plantFoodEffect: Fires a plasma ball that clears the entire lane.

name: Caulipower
baseAbility: Shoots magic bolts (random target, passes through obstacles, hypnotizes).
plantFoodEffect: Hypnotizes several random zombies on the lawn.

name: Electric Blueberry
baseAbility: Strikes with lightning (random target, destroys one zombie completely).
plantFoodEffect: Completely destroys 3 random zombies.

name: Bowling Bulb
baseAbility: Rolls 3 bulb types that ricochet between lanes (like Wall-nut Bowling). Regen per bulb - Cyan: 2s | Blue: 5s | Orange: 10s
plantFoodEffect: Rolls 3 giant explosive bulbs that ricochet.

name: Cactus
baseAbility: Shoots straight spikes that pierce through 3 zombies.
plantFoodEffect: Fires high-damage electric spikes with unlimited piercing.

name: Fire Peashooter
baseAbility: Shoots straight flaming peas (2x damage).
plantFoodEffect: Fires a blazing volley across the entire lane.

name: Starfruit
baseAbility: Shoots stars in 5 directions, including backward.
plantFoodEffect: Fires a volley of stars in every direction.

name: Goo Peashooter
baseAbility: Shoots straight peas (ignores armor + damage over time).
plantFoodEffect: Fires a toxic volley that poisons zombies on the spot.

name: Mega Gatling Pea
baseAbility: Shoots 4 straight peas in rapid succession at very high speed.
plantFoodEffect: Unleashes a massive, long volley down the lane plus 4 giant peas.

name: Sea-shroom
baseAbility: Shoots short-range spores. Limited lifespan of 60 seconds.
plantFoodEffect: Fires a volley and resets the lifespan of all Sea-shrooms.

name: Puff-shroom
baseAbility: Shoots short-range spores. Limited lifespan of 60 seconds.
plantFoodEffect: Fires a volley and resets the lifespan of all Puff-shrooms.

name: Fume-shroom
baseAbility: Shoots medium-range fumes that pass through zombies.
plantFoodEffect: Blasts a huge fume cloud that knocks zombies back.

name: Cabbage-pult
baseAbility: Lobs shots over obstacles.
plantFoodEffect: Hurls cabbages at several random zombies.

name: Kernel-pult
baseAbility: Lobs kernels (low damage) or butter (briefly stops zombies).
plantFoodEffect: Hurls butter at every zombie on the lawn.

name: Melon-pult
baseAbility: Lobs heavy shots with area damage.
plantFoodEffect: Hurls a giant melon at random zombies.

name: Winter Melon
baseAbility: Lobs heavy shots with area damage (slows zombies).
plantFoodEffect: Hurls icy melons at random zombies.

name: Pepper-pult
baseAbility: Lobs shots with area damage (warms nearby tiles).
plantFoodEffect: Hurls large peppers at 3 random zombies.

name: Potato Mine
baseAbility: Arms after a 15-second delay; explodes on contact.
plantFoodEffect: Arms instantly and launches 2 extra mine clones.

name: Primal Potato Mine
baseAbility: Arms faster (5 seconds) with a 3x3 area explosion.
plantFoodEffect: Arms instantly and launches 2 mines to other spots.

name: Cherry Bomb
baseAbility: Instantly explodes in a 3x3 area.
plantFoodEffect: None (single-use).

name: Squash
baseAbility: Squashes the first nearby zombie.
plantFoodEffect: Squashes 2 random zombies on the lawn.

name: Grapeshot
baseAbility: Explodes in a 3x3 area and launches ricocheting grapes that vanish after 5 seconds.
plantFoodEffect: None (single-use).

name: Jalapeno
baseAbility: Instantly ignites every zombie in the lane (melts ice).
plantFoodEffect: None (single-use).

name: Doom-shroom
baseAbility: Massive explosion across the whole lawn, leaving an unplantable crater.
plantFoodEffect: None (single-use).

name: Tangle Kelp
baseAbility: Drags the first water zombie underwater and destroys it (beach only).
plantFoodEffect: Drags several random zombies in the water under the surface.

name: Iceberg Lettuce
baseAbility: Freezes the first zombie that steps on it.
plantFoodEffect: Freezes every zombie on the screen.

name: Bonk Choy
baseAbility: Punches zombies in the tiles ahead and behind.
plantFoodEffect: Throws a flurry of punches in a 3x3 area around itself.

name: Phat Beet
baseAbility: Sonic blast hitting a 3x3 area around itself.
plantFoodEffect: Unleashes a devastating sonic blast on all nearby zombies.

name: Chomper
baseAbility: Instantly swallows one zombie, then digests for 40 seconds.
plantFoodEffect: Swallows 3 zombies at once from a distance.

name: Wasabi Whip
baseAbility: Whips the tiles ahead and behind (warms nearby tiles).
plantFoodEffect: Spins its whip across a 3x3 area.

name: Kiwibeast
baseAbility: Area sonic wave; grows over time, dealing more damage. To Stg2: 24s | To Stg3: 72s
plantFoodEffect: Leaps and slams the ground, dealing area damage.

name: Wall-nut
baseAbility: Tough defensive barrier that stops zombies.
plantFoodEffect: Gains permanent armor worth 4000 extra HP.

name: Tall-nut
baseAbility: Tall barrier; stops zombies from vaulting over it.
plantFoodEffect: Gains permanent armor worth 8000 HP.

name: Endurian
baseAbility: Defensive barrier that reflects damage back at attackers.
plantFoodEffect: Gains metal armor and increased reflect damage.

name: Garlic
baseAbility: When bitten, forces the zombie to move to an adjacent lane.
plantFoodEffect: Forces every zombie in the lane into other lanes.

name: Sweet Potato
baseAbility: Lure; pulls zombies from adjacent lanes into its own lane.
plantFoodEffect: Pulls in all nearby zombies and fully restores its HP.

name: Explode-o-nut
baseAbility: Defensive barrier that explodes in an area when destroyed.
plantFoodEffect: Gains metal armor (the armor also explodes when destroyed).

name: Pumpkin
baseAbility: Protective shell; planted over other plants to shield them.
plantFoodEffect: Gains powerful metal armor.

name: Sun Bean
baseAbility: Acts as a defensive wall and produces 5 sun with every hit it takes.
plantFoodEffect: Gains powerful metal armor.

name: Torchwood
baseAbility: Modifies peas; turns passing peas fiery (2x damage, melts ice).
plantFoodEffect: Burns with blue flame (triples pea damage).

name: Magnet-shroom
baseAbility: Disarms zombies; pulls metal objects (buckets/helmets) off their heads.
plantFoodEffect: Pulls in several metal objects at once and digests them.

name: Hypno-shroom
baseAbility: When bitten, hypnotizes the attacking zombie to fight for you.
plantFoodEffect: Turns the zombie that eats it into an allied Gargantuar.

name: Cat-tail
baseAbility: Fires homing spikes at the nearest zombie.
plantFoodEffect: Fires a volley of homing spikes.

name: Imitater
baseAbility: Copies another plant (lets you use two of the same card).
plantFoodEffect: None (depends on the copied plant).

name: Ice-shroom
baseAbility: Freezes and briefly stops every zombie on the map.
plantFoodEffect: None (single-use).

name: Lily Pad
baseAbility: Planting platform for other plants on water (essential for the beach).
plantFoodEffect: Creates several copies of itself on empty water tiles.

name: Hot Potato
baseAbility: Plant on ice to melt it instantly (essential for the frozen cave).
plantFoodEffect: None (single-use).

name: Grave Buster
baseAbility: Destroys graves (essential for Ancient Egypt and Dark Ages levels).
plantFoodEffect: None (single-use).

name: Enlighten-mint
baseAbility: Temporarily applies Plant Food to every plant in its family.
plantFoodEffect: None (single-use).

name: Appease-mint
baseAbility: Temporarily applies Plant Food to every plant in its family.
plantFoodEffect: None (single-use).

name: Arma-mint
baseAbility: Temporarily applies Plant Food to every plant in its family.
plantFoodEffect: None (single-use).

name: Bombard-mint
baseAbility: Temporarily applies Plant Food to every plant in its family.
plantFoodEffect: None (single-use).

name: Enforce-mint
baseAbility: Temporarily applies Plant Food to every plant in its family.
plantFoodEffect: None (single-use).

name: Reinforce-mint
baseAbility: Temporarily applies Plant Food to every plant in its family.
plantFoodEffect: None (single-use).

name: Enchant-mint
baseAbility: Temporarily applies Plant Food to every plant in its family.
plantFoodEffect: None (single-use).

name: Pierce-mint
baseAbility: Temporarily applies Plant Food to every plant in its family.
plantFoodEffect: None (single-use).

name: catTail-mint
baseAbility: Temporarily applies Plant Food to every plant in its family.
plantFoodEffect: None (single-use).
